items.title: Sauce Labs Launches AI Agent to Automate Test Creation and Close the DevOps “Velocity Gap”
items.summaryShort: Sauce Labs Launches AI Agent to Automate Test Creation and Close the DevOps “Velocity Gap”. Sauce Labs has announced the general availability of Sauce AI for Test Authoring, an AI-driven agent designed to translate business intent directly

items.title: Mistral AI Introduces Workflows for Orchestrating Enterprise AI Processes
items.summaryShort: Mistral AI Introduces Workflows for Orchestrating Enterprise AI Processes. Mistral AI has launched Workflows, an orchestration layer for enterprise AI that is now in public preview.

items.title: QCon AI Boston 2026 Schedule: Agents in Production, Inference Cost, and AI in the SDLC
items.summaryShort: QCon AI Boston 2026 Schedule: Agents in Production, Inference Cost, and AI in the SDLC. The schedule for QCon AI Boston 2026 (June 1-2) is now live.

items.title: AWS Interconnect Reaches General Availability with Managed Multicloud and Last-Mile Connectivity
items.summaryShort: AWS Interconnect Reaches General Availability with Managed Multicloud and Last-Mile Connectivity. AWS Interconnect reached general availability, offering managed private Layer 3 connections to Google Cloud and a last-mile capability via Lum

items.title: GitHub Targets Large Merge Problem with Stacked PRs
items.summaryShort: GitHub Targets Large Merge Problem with Stacked PRs. GitHub has launched a native stacked pull request workflow through a new CLI extension called gh-stack, closing a gap that third-party tools have filled for several years.

items.title: Apple loses bid to pause App Store fee changes as case heads to Supreme Court
items.summaryShort: Apple loses bid to pause App Store fee changes as case heads to Supreme Court. Apple lost its bid to pause court-ordered App Store payment changes, keeping external purchase links in place as its case with Epic heads toward the Supreme Cour

items.title: Earth AI is vertically integrating the search for critical minerals
items.summaryShort: Earth AI is vertically integrating the search for critical minerals. When Earth AI started hitting months-long delays in its search for critical minerals, it decided to take matters into its own hands.

items.title: Sri Lanka discloses another missing payment, days after hackers stole $2.5M from its finance ministry
